reasoning: Order #000000514 is marked Complete and the item status shows Shipped with full payment received and no refunds issued. The customer claims the tracking shows Delivered but the package was not received. Since delivery is confirmed and no carrier tracking or proof of loss is visible on this page, this requires further investigation (carrier delivery confirmation, potential porch theft, or address verification) before issuing a refund. Per policy, delivered-but-not-received claims should be escalated for carrier investigation rather than immediately approved.
